title: sumparakaleo #4837
definition:
1) to call upon or invite or exhort at the same time or together
 2) to strengthen (comfort) with others
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to call upon or invite or exhort at the same time or together
 2) to strengthen (comfort) with others

    NASB:  to exhort together, pass. to be strengthened with:
